SKILL_EFF_BG_SAVE.notes: Nihilum-only (2 instances). eff_opt references b_nihilum_phantom_1, suggesting background/scene-layer state for phase transition. Likely visual/checkpoint, not combat.

SKILL_EFF_BUFF_TYPE_CS_SET_ADD.notes: All 11 samples target TARGET_UNIT_CASTER with eff_opt='[all,CS_DEBUFF]', MATHSIGN_SET, eff_value=0. Likely bulk-override of active debuffs or zero-out of CS_DEBUFF slot.
todos: SET+0 = remove all vs set count to 0?

SKILL_EFF_CARD_CHANGE.notes: Replaces a card's identity with another card def (CARD_SET_THIS_CARD or CARD_SET_DESIGNED). Both OPERATION_ACTIVE and OPERATION_TRIGGER. Used by mutation forms (e.g., Camille).

SKILL_EFF_CARD_COPY_TO.notes: Duplicates a card to eff_card_place zone. Original remains. Subject to play conditions (vs IGNORE_COND variant).
todos: eff_value vs eff_card_target_count for copy count

SKILL_EFF_CARD_COPY_TO_IGNORE_COND.notes: Copies CARD_SET_TRIGGERED card ignoring eff_link_condition gates. Exclusively OPERATION_TRIGGER.
todos: confirm bypass is eff_link_condition_id vs play-condition

SKILL_EFF_CARD_COST_CHANGE.notes: Modifies AP cost via MATHSIGN_ADD (relative) or MATHSIGN_SET (absolute). Always OPERATION_PASSIVE — persistent while source effect active. Multiple instances stack additively.
todos: persistence across reshuffles vs reset on deck cycling

SKILL_EFF_CARD_DEBUFF_ADD.notes: Attaches negative card-status (debuff counter). eff_opt empty in all samples — debuff type likely encoded in eff_id or parent CS. Used by collapse mechanics and monster effects.
todos: identify debuff type enum (in linked CS definition?)

SKILL_EFF_CARD_DISCARD.notes: Moves cards from hand (or specified zone) to discard pile. eff_value=-1 means discard all matching. Supports type/talent/order filtering. OPERATION_TRIGGER variant fires reactively.

SKILL_EFF_CARD_DRAW.notes: Draws eff_card_target_count cards from deck into hand. auto_shuffle_flag=YES enables auto-reshuffle of discard. Type/talent filtering supported.

SKILL_EFF_CARD_EXHAUST.notes: Permanently removes card from play this battle (exhaust zone, distinct from discard). Cannot be reshuffled. Shares F_DISCARD formula; exhaust is non-recyclable variant.
todos: confirm exhaust pile unreachable by MOVE_TO/DRAW

SKILL_EFF_CARD_GET.notes: Generates a new card instance into target zone (typically hand). Card def via CARD_SET_DESIGNED. eff_value = copy count. Highest observed_count (897) in card category.

SKILL_EFF_CARD_MOVE_TO.notes: Generic zone transfer. Source via target_card_set_list_card_place, dest via eff_card_place. Supports CARD_PLACE_DECK_TOP. Most frequent card primitive (2075 obs).
todos: MOVE_TO top vs random deck insert: separate sub-ref?

SKILL_EFF_CARD_OPTION_SELECT.notes: Presents card selection UI to player. Pure UI meta-action; downstream effects gated on selection via eff_opt_multiple_link. Only 5 client instances.

SKILL_EFF_CARD_RAN_SELECT_USE.notes: Randomly selects card from pool (eff_opt_multiple_link) and triggers USE. Associated with Bookie's poker-hand combos (straight, full-house, trips).
todos: full CS chain or only damage effect?

SKILL_EFF_CARD_SHUFFLE.notes: Randomizes zone order (eff_opt='[random]'). Single observed instance moves discard to deck with shuffle. Monster nihilum only.

SKILL_EFF_CARD_TALENT_ADD.notes: Attaches named talent tag (TALENT_RECALL, TALENT_CONNECT, TALENT_RETAIN, TALENT_ETHEREAL) via eff_opt. eff_value with MATHSIGN_ADD = stack count (-1 = permanent). Multiple talents stack on same card.

SKILL_EFF_CARD_TALENT_REMOVE.notes: Removes talent tag (eff_opt specifies which; almost exclusively TALENT_UNPLAYABLE in observations). Exclusively OPERATION_TRIGGER (clear locked status when condition clears).

SKILL_EFF_CARD_USE.notes: Programmatically plays a card (executes full CS chain) without manual input. Both OPERATION_ACTIVE and OPERATION_TRIGGER. Used by triggered chains and combos.
todos: does CARD_USE consume the card normally (discard) or return to hand?

SKILL_EFF_COUNT_VALUE_ADDITIONAL.notes: OPERATION_PASSIVE modifier of another skill effect's eff_count_value (typically +1 hit count on DMG). Target effect identified by eff_opt. May scale with VALUE_HAND_CARD_AMOUNT_MULTIPLY. Never observed in dev_msg.
todos: validate against runtime when capture supports passives

SKILL_EFF_CRITICAL_PCT_VALUE_ADD.notes: Adds flat integer to crit percentage of attached skill/card. eff_value 30/50 on cards, 1 on relic. Always OPERATION_PASSIVE. Caster-self application. Never observed in dev_msg.

SKILL_EFF_CS_ADD_COND_AUTO.notes: Condition-triggered auto stack add. 91% OPERATION_TRIGGER with semantic conditions (EGO-sequence, hand-count, draw events, HP checks). Distinct from CS_SET_ADD_AUTO (passive scheduling).

SKILL_EFF_CS_SET.notes: Bookie-specific: registers a 12-cs pool (cs01_0521..0532) as active for the unit. Distinct from CS_SET_ADD (which pushes additive stacks); declares the available stack pool.

SKILL_EFF_CS_SET_ADD.notes: Most-observed effect (10k+ obs). cs_id is in link_cs_id (NOT eff_value). eff_value is stack weight (0-250). Stacks consumed before snapshot polling (dva_css limit per Track B).
todos: clarify eff_value: per-stack weight vs initial term_value

SKILL_EFF_CS_SET_ADD_AUTO.notes: AUTO variant fires passively or as card-resolved side effect. 60 of 142 instances are OPERATION_PASSIVE. Structurally identical to F_ADD_CS.
todos: distinguish ACTIVE vs PASSIVE scheduling phases
fires on turn_start, on_draw, or on_card_resolve?

SKILL_EFF_CS_SET_ADD_CASTER_MODIFY.notes: Only cs_management type that exclusively targets enemies. All instances OPERATION_TRIGGER sourced from cs02_* (caster-owned CS). Caster's stack value propagates to enemies.
todos: verify CASTER_MODIFY = stack VALUE propagation vs count

SKILL_EFF_CS_SET_ADD_IGNORE_BLOCK.notes: Bypasses block mechanism (immunity/cap/resistance). 86% have eff_link_condition_id. Used for forced reinforcement loops in cs(card2). eff_value=99 outlier on c_30097_uni4 suggests 'max stack' push.

SKILL_EFF_CS_SET_ADD_IGNORE_COND.notes: 696 instances (2nd most common). 99% have non-null eff_link_condition_id but ignore it at application time. Unconditional-force CS add. Heavy use in cs(card2) for self-reinforcing loops.

SKILL_EFF_CS_SET_ADD_RANDOM.notes: Engine picks ONE cs_id randomly from link_cs_id list (not all). 12 of 20 instances have 2-4 cs_ids. cs00_* ids dominate (global public condition stacks).
todos: eff_value applies to selected stack or pre-selection?

SKILL_EFF_CURE.notes: Removes negative status conditions (CS cleanse). eff_value is a flat numeric cure power (VALUE_COMMON). Used exclusively by healer archetypes.

SKILL_EFF_CURE_IGNORE_COND.notes: Triggered variant of CURE (100% OPERATION_TRIGGER). eff_attr=[CURE_ATTR_FIX] on most instances. Sourced from CS passives and relics; bypasses normal cure conditions.

SKILL_EFF_CURE_VALUE_ADD.notes: OPERATION_PASSIVE additive bonus to effective cure power. Never observed in live battles. Sources include partners, fate skills, relics.

SKILL_EFF_DAMAGE_VALUE_ADD.notes: Passive flat or percentage bonus to outgoing damage. OPERATION_PASSIVE with MATHSIGN_ADD_HUND_MULTIPLY_PCT; consumed before snapshot polling (dva_css class).

SKILL_EFF_DMG.notes: Standard attack-card damage hit. eff_value is the ATK multiplier scaled by /100; empirically validated as dmg = ATK × (eff_value/100) × (1 − S_DMG_DECREASE_RATE) × crit_factor × weak_mult. Fires on OPERATION_ACTIVE cards.

SKILL_EFF_DMG_COOP.notes: Cooperative/assist additional attack (DMG_ATTR_ADDITIONAL_ATTACK). Fires as OPERATION_ACTIVE triggered by another character's card play. Assisting character delivers a hit at eff_value/100 × ATK.
todos: verify crit_factor path vs base hits

SKILL_EFF_DMG_IGNORE_COND.notes: Damage that bypasses condition gates (DMG_ATTR_IGNORE_STAT / IGNORE_REVISE). Same base formula as SKILL_EFF_DMG; the IGNORE_COND suffix means execution skips the standard condition eligibility check.
todos: confirm which condition gates are bypassed via event-stream capture

SKILL_EFF_EGO_FIELD_CHANGE.notes: Modifies Manifest Ego field level via MATHSIGN_SUBTRACT_MIN_0 / ADD. eff_value 2-3. Primarily card(bookie). eff_opt='[max_pct]' on a subset.
todos: EGO_FIELD = Manifest Ego gauge or sub-field?

SKILL_EFF_ENERGY_CHANGE.notes: Primary energy/morale adjustment mechanism. ADD/SUBTRACT_MIN_0 with eff_value 1-3. Tied to ep_amt and draw/cycle conditions. 84 client instances, 177 observed.

SKILL_EFF_HEAL.notes: HP restoration. eff_value is % of caster max HP (VALUE_CASTER_HP_MAX_PCT, ~80% of instances). Distinct from CURE: HEAL restores HP, CURE removes negative status conditions.

SKILL_EFF_KILL.notes: Instantly eliminates target regardless of HP. target_unit_type_opt=[only_half_death] or [with_half_death] suggests phase-gate execution. Used by bookie and monsters.

SKILL_EFF_MAX_HP.notes: MATHSIGN_ADD with VALUE_TARGET_HP_MAX_PCT — adds % of target max HP to cap. Boss setups on first turn (cd_tn_start_first_00). Distinct from HEAL.
todos: does increase also refill current HP by delta?

SKILL_EFF_MAX_HP_DECREASE.notes: Single monster(secred) instance. VALUE_CASTER_HP_MAX_PCT with condition multiplier. Reduces HP ceiling — likely self-debuff/phase mechanic.
todos: clamp current HP to new cap?

SKILL_EFF_MONSTER_CARD_RESELECT.notes: 1 client instance (cs02_0249_01). OPERATION_TRIGGER after player attack. Monster re-picks card. Soft reselect vs FORCE variant.
todos: immediate re-draw or flag for next turn?

SKILL_EFF_MONSTER_CARD_RESELECT_FORCE.notes: 8 instances from cs(monster). 100% OPERATION_TRIGGER, sometimes run_pct=50 (probabilistic). 'FORCE' compels monster to swap selected card bypassing lock/prevention.

SKILL_EFF_MONSTER_CHANGE.notes: monster(chaos_religion) phase transitions. eff_opt_multiple_link contains target monster id. eff_value=-1 'replace fully' sentinel. Condition cd_char_hq_le0 gates form change.
todos: full entity swap or stat/model overlay?

SKILL_EFF_MONSTER_CREATE.notes: eff_opt_multiple_link contains cr_* creature IDs to spawn. eff_value=1 / MATHSIGN_NONE common. Fires on kills or spawn-counter conditions. timing_interrupt_flag present.

SKILL_EFF_MONSTER_TURN_COUNT.notes: Monster turn-action budget. ADD/SUBTRACT_MIN_0/SET on counter, values 0-5. 35 client instances, 279 observed. Camille +2 to all enemies after draw.

SKILL_EFF_NONE.notes: Engine null/no-op effect. 49 instances often used as text_tag annotations (id 'c_30093_text_tag_*') or trigger-chain placeholders. Produces no battle state change.

SKILL_EFF_SHIELD.notes: Grants a one-time HP buffer. eff_value is flat HP (VALUE_COMMON) or % of caster max HP (VALUE_CASTER_HP_MAX_PCT). Caster-targeted 87% of the time; ~30 instances target enemies.

SKILL_EFF_SHIELD_CHANGE.notes: Mutates existing shield value on target (strip/scale). Both observed instances set/multiply to 0 — effectively a shield-removal mechanic. Only 2 client instances.
todos: check non-zero eff_value cases in future data

SKILL_EFF_SHIELD_IGNORE_COND.notes: Reactive shield grant (100% OPERATION_TRIGGER on draw/exhaust/attack events). Same formula as SHIELD; bypasses shield-blocking conditions like SKILL_EFF_SHIELD_GAIN_BAN.
todos: confirm bypass of SHIELD_GAIN_BAN against runtime data

SKILL_EFF_SHIELD_VALUE_ADD.notes: OPERATION_PASSIVE modifier that adds flat or percentage HP to shield grants. Never observed in live battles. Found on relics, partners, piece sets.
todos: capture a live event to confirm timing

SKILL_EFF_STRESS_ADD.notes: Increments target stress counter by eff_value. Stress is per-character accumulating gauge; reaches collapse threshold triggers failure. eff_value typically 1-13 (up to 40); some instances use negative eff_value (stress reduction). target_unit_type varies (CASTER, CHAR_ID, CHAR_RANDOM, etc).

SKILL_EFF_STRESS_ADD_NONE_COLLAPSE.notes: Stress increment variant that bypasses the collapse check. All 10 instances OPERATION_TRIGGER, eff_value=1 or 2. Used in cs00 passive entries gated by combat-state conditions.

SKILL_EFF_TACTIC_GAUGE_ADD.notes: Tactic gauge (separate from energy). ADD/SUBTRACT/SET with fractional (0.1) to integer (8) values. Mostly card(neutral). Tied to ep_amt and turn-timing conditions.

SKILL_EFF_TARGET_CS_VALUE_ADD.notes: THIS IS THE dva_css MECHANISM from Track B. Modifies cs_id value on target unit (link_cs_id). 23 distinct cs_ids touched. Math signs: ADD/MULTIPLY/ADD_HUND_MULTIPLY_PCT/SUBTRACT. eff_value 1-100. Always OPERATION_PASSIVE. Never observed in dev_msg.

SKILL_EFF_TRIGGER_INSPIRATION.notes: Highest meta-bucket count (629 obs / 6 client instances). Fires Inspiration trigger on a card in hand. LIST_PICK_RAN_NOT_TRIGGERED_INSPIRATION picks random non-inspired card.

SKILL_EFF_TRIGGER_RETAINED.notes: card(domi). Operates on CARD_SET_BEFORE_EFF_TARGET/TRIGGERED/ALL at hand. Fires on-retain bonus (cards held across turn boundary). during_eff_0_link_* params suggest mid-effect chaining.
